dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your store today.
dashboard.noActivityDesc: Start by adding products and making your first sale. Activity will appear here.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage your product catalog and categories
products.searchPlaceholder: Search products by name, SKU, or barcode...
products.noProductsDesc: Add your first product to start building your catalog. Products are the foundation of your POS system.

sales.title: Sales
sales.subtitle: Process transactions and manage sales
sales.readyToSellDesc: Search for products or scan a barcode to begin a new transaction.
sales.cartEmpty: Cart is empty. Add products to begin.

terminals.title: Terminals
terminals.subtitle: Manage your POS terminals and sessions
terminals.noTerminalsDesc: Set up POS terminals to enable multi-device checkout. Each terminal tracks its own sessions and cash drawer.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Track stock levels and manage inventory movements
inventory.noInventoryDesc: Add products to your catalog to start tracking inventory levels automatically.

store.title: Store Information
store.desc: Core business details shown on receipts, invoices, and your storefront.
store.businessDetailsDesc: This information is visible to customers

users.title: Users & Roles
users.desc: Manage who has access to your store and what they can do.
users.teamMembersDesc: People with access to your SwiftBill account
users.inviteDesc: Add a team member to your store.

payments.title: Payment Methods
payments.desc: Choose which payment types your store accepts. These options appear at checkout.
payments.cashDesc: Physical cash, coins, and notes. Tracked via cash drawer.
payments.cardDesc: Credit and debit cards via connected terminal reader.
payments.mobilePayDesc: UPI, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other digital wallets.
payments.storeCreditDesc: Allow customers to pay with store credit or gift cards.

receipts.title: Receipts & Printing
receipts.desc: Customize what appears on printed and digital receipts.
receipts.receiptContentDesc: Text shown at the top and bottom of every receipt
receipts.headerPlaceholder: Thank you for shopping with us!
receipts.footerPlaceholder: Visit us again! Returns within 30 days.

tax.title: Tax / GST
tax.desc: Configure GST registration, tax slabs, and tax calculation settings.
tax.enableGstDesc: Apply GST calculations to all transactions
tax.defaultSlabDesc: Applied to new products by default
tax.taxSlabsDesc: Manage your GST rates and associated HSN codes
tax.addSlabDesc: Create a new tax rate for your store.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: Configure alerts for low stock, daily summaries, and transaction events.
notifications.lowStockAlertDesc: Get notified when product stock falls below the threshold
notifications.dailySummaryDesc: Receive a daily recap of sales, revenue, and activity
notifications.newSaleDesc: Get notified for every completed transaction
notifications.refundProcessedDesc: Alert when a refund or void is processed
notifications.notificationEmailDesc: Where alerts are sent (leave blank to use store email)

security.title: Security
security.desc: Manage your password, terminal PIN, and active sessions.
security.terminalPinDesc: Quick PIN for terminal login (4-6 digits)
security.activeSessionsDesc: Devices currently signed into your account

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.desc: Customize the visual style of your POS interface.
appearance.darkDesc: Easy on the eyes in low light
appearance.accentColorDesc: Primary color used throughout the interface
appearance.compactModeDesc: Reduce padding for more content density

regional.title: Regional Settings
regional.desc: Configure date, time, language, currency, and number formatting for your store.
regional.localeFormattingDesc: These settings affect how dates, times, and numbers are displayed
regional.formatPreviewDesc: How values will appear in your store

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.createAccountDesc: Get started with SwiftBill in seconds
auth.heroDesc: A lightning-fast point of sale system that works online and offline. Built for modern retail.
auth.registerHeroDesc: Set up your store, add products, and start selling. No complicated setup, no monthly fees.

common.comingSoonDesc: This section is under development and will be available in a future update.
